name: repo-bootstrap
description: Scaffold new repos with proven conventions: agent docs (AGENTS.md/STYLEGUIDE.md), Claude Code settings, semble code search, capt-hook guard hooks, a generated mascot logo + README banner + GitHub social-preview card, and an opinionated Python layer (uv, Click, pytest, ruff, ty) with optional Great Docs and tag-driven PyPI trusted-publishing features.
